truthful_notice: This projection combines persisted machine evidence with verified repository activity. The last public inventory predates newer Site commits, so repository totals and action counts are retained as the last observed cycle—not asserted as current—until the scheduled auditor persists a rescan.

examples.message: Align GP10 browser evidence and bundle exports with canonical schemas
Verify GP10 evidence review and bundle export
Add isolated StegMusic tester profiles and accessibility contract

nodes.title: Public ecosystem truth cycle
nodes.current_step: Rescan public repositories, reclassify evidence, and regenerate the action queue from current repository state.

nodes.title: Enumerate public ecosystem repositories
nodes.result: The last persisted cycle enumerated 72 repositories across 8 organizations, but newer repository activity exists and has not yet been incorporated.

nodes.title: Inspect objective and runtime evidence
nodes.result: Strict inspection remains installed, but its latest ecosystem-wide result predates newer repository evidence.

nodes.title: Reclassify public repository integrity
nodes.current_step: Await a new machine-generated inventory and evidence pass before changing repository completion classifications.

nodes.title: Regenerate public remediation queue
nodes.current_step: The last observed queue contained 71 actions; a new queue must be derived from the rescan.

nodes.title: Unify runtime freshness source of truth
nodes.result: The dispatcher reads canonical data/autonomy/freshness-policy.json and no longer restores the obsolete hard-coded threshold.

nodes.title: Verify public Site runtime after repair
nodes.current_step: The latest persisted receipt still reports 6 of 7 checks passing with freshness failed; no newer cadence-policy-aware PASS has been observed.

nodes.title: Project LLM-adapter operational evidence
nodes.result: The destination-owned projection executed and persisted BLOCKED with 11 unmet live, provider, storage, custody, reconstructability, receipt, and destination-state gates.

nodes.title: Project Triage implementation evidence
nodes.result: The destination-owned workflow passed implementation checks. User-facing execution, runtime observation, and outcome verification remain absent.

nodes.title: Apply public ecosystem completion gate
nodes.current_step: No ecosystem-wide completion decision may be refreshed until the inventory rescan completes; existing destination projections remain fail-closed.

corrective_actions.action: Execute and persist a new public repository inventory, evidence inspection, classification, and action-planning cycle
corrective_actions.reason: Verified Site activity occurred after the last persisted ecosystem inventory.

corrective_actions.action: Persist the corrected cadence-policy-aware Site runtime verification
corrective_actions.reason: No newer machine-produced PASS receipt has replaced the prior freshness failure.

corrective_actions.action: Satisfy LLM-adapter live provider, storage, custody, reconstructability, receipt, and destination-state gates through its repository-owned workflow
corrective_actions.reason: Its destination-owned projection reports 11 critical blockers.

corrective_actions.action: Build and verify a bounded user-facing Triage execution surface
corrective_actions.reason: Implementation evidence passes, but runtime and user-visible outcome evidence do not exist.

completed_history.title: First destination-owned evidence cycle
completed_history.result: LLM-adapter and Triage executed repository-owned evidence projections without converting incomplete evidence into completion.
